title: scorzonera neapolitana
intro: Scorzonera neapolitana is a perennial plant species that belongs to the sunflower family and is native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Scorzonera neapolitana include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestive health, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant is often used to make herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
